pivot_verses.en: And ask those We sent before you of Our messengers; have We made besides the Most Merciful deities to be worshipped?

control_verses.ar: وَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكُمُ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
control_verses.en: And never let Satan avert you. Indeed, he is to you a clear enemy.

pivot_verses.ar: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
pivot_verses.en: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -

pivot_verses.ar: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
pivot_verses.en: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.

control_verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍۢ
control_verses.en: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place;

control_verses.ar: فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍۢ
control_verses.en: Within gardens and springs,

pivot_verses.ar: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَٰكَ عَلَىٰ شَرِيعَةٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْأَمْرِ فَٱتَّبِعْهَا وَلَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَآءَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Then We put you, [O Muhammad], on an ordained way concerning the matter [of religion]; so follow it and do not follow the inclinations of those who do not know.

control_verses.ar: وَإِذَا عَلِمَ مِنْ ءَايَٰتِنَا شَيْـًٔا ٱتَّخَذَهَا هُزُوًا ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌۭ مُّهِينٌۭ
control_verses.en: And when he knows anything of Our verses, he takes them in ridicule. Those will have a humiliating punishment.

pivot_block_label: The son who mocks his parents

pivot_verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِى قَالَ لِوَٰلِدَيْهِ أُفٍّۢ لَّكُمَآ أَتَعِدَانِنِىٓ أَنْ أُخْرَجَ وَقَدْ خَلَتِ ٱلْقُرُونُ مِن قَبْلِى وَهُمَا يَسْتَغِيثَانِ ٱللَّهَ وَيْلَكَ ءَامِنْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّۭ فَيَقُولُ مَا هَٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
pivot_verses.en: But one who says to his parents, "Uff to you; do you promise me that I will be brought forth [from the earth] when generations before me have already passed on [into oblivion]?" while they call to Allah for help [and to their son], "Woe to you! Believe! Indeed, the promise of Allah is truth." But he says, "This is not but legends of the former people" -

pivot_verses.ar: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ حَقَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقَوْلُ فِىٓ أُمَمٍۢ قَدْ خَلَتْ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ خَٰسِرِينَ
pivot_verses.en: Those are the ones upon whom the word has come into effect, [who will be] among nations which had passed on before them of jinn and men. Indeed, they [all] were losers.

pivot_verses.ar: وَلِكُلٍّۢ دَرَجَٰتٌۭ مِّمَّا عَمِلُوا۟ ۖ وَلِيُوَفِّيَهُمْ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
pivot_verses.en: And for all there are degrees [of reward and punishment] for what they have done, and [it is] so that He may fully compensate them for their deeds, and they will not be wronged.

control_verses.ar: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَلَمْ يَعْىَ بِخَلْقِهِنَّ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْۦِىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ ۚ بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ
control_verses.en: Do they not see that Allah, who created the heavens and earth and did not fail in their creation, is able to give life to the dead? Yes. Indeed, He is over all things competent.

control_verses.ar: وَيَوْمَ يُعْرَضُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ أَلَيْسَ هَٰذَا بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ وَرَبِّنَا ۚ قَالَ فَذُوقُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
control_verses.en: And the Day those who disbelieved are exposed to the Fire [it will be said], "Is this not the truth?" They will say, "Yes, by our Lord." He will say, "Then taste the punishment because you used to disbelieve."

control_verses.ar: فَٱصْبِرْ كَمَا صَبَرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْعَزْمِ مِنَ ٱلرُّسُلِ وَلَا تَسْتَعْجِل لَّهُمْ ۚ كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَ مَا يُوعَدُونَ لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ إِلَّا سَاعَةًۭ مِّن نَّهَارٍۭ ۚ بَلَٰغٌۭ ۚ فَهَلْ يُهْلَكُ إِلَّا ٱلْقَوْمُ ٱلْفَٰسِقُونَ
control_verses.en: So be patient, [O Muhammad], as were those of determination among the messengers and do not be impatient for them. It will be - on the Day they see that which they are promised - as though they had not remained [in the world] except an hour of a day. [This is] notification. And will [any] be destroyed except the defiantly disobedient people?

pivot_block_label: Among them those who listen then forget

pivot_verses.ar: فَٱعْلَمْ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لِذَنۢبِكَ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مُتَقَلَّبَكُمْ وَمَثْوَىٰكُمْ
pivot_verses.en: So know, [O Muhammad], that there is no deity except Allah and ask forgiveness for your sin and for the believing men and believing women. And Allah knows of your movement and your resting place.

control_verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَءَامَنُوا۟ بِمَا نُزِّلَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍۢ وَهُوَ ٱلْحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّهِمْ ۙ كَفَّرَ عَنْهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ وَأَصْلَحَ بَالَهُمْ
control_verses.en: And those who believe and do righteous deeds and believe in what has been sent down upon Muhammad - and it is the truth from their Lord - He will remove from them their misdeeds and amend their condition.

pivot_verses.ar: وَلِلَّهِ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ يَغْفِرُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيُعَذِّبُ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورًۭا رَّحِيمًۭا
pivot_verses.en: And to Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. He forgives whom He wills and punishes whom He wills. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful.

control_verses.ar: مُّحَمَّدٌۭ رَّسُولُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥٓ أَشِدَّآءُ عَلَى ٱلْكُفَّارِ رُحَمَآءُ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ تَرَىٰهُمْ رُكَّعًۭا سُجَّدًۭا يَبْتَغُونَ فَضْلًۭا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنًۭا ۖ سِيمَاهُمْ فِى وُجُوهِهِم مِّنْ أَثَرِ ٱلسُّجُودِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ مَثَلُهُمْ فِى ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةِ ۚ وَمَثَلُهُمْ فِى ٱلْإِنجِيلِ كَزَرْعٍ أَخْرَجَ شَطْـَٔهُۥ فَـَٔازَرَهُۥ فَٱسْتَغْلَظَ فَٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَىٰ سُوقِهِۦ يُعْجِبُ ٱلزُّرَّاعَ لِيَغِيظَ بِهِمُ ٱلْكُفَّارَ ۗ وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ مِنْهُم مَّغْفِرَةًۭ وَأَجْرًا عَظِيمًۢا
control_verses.en: Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; and those with him are forceful against the disbelievers, merciful among themselves. You see them bowing and prostrating [in prayer], seeking bounty from Allah and [His] pleasure. Their mark is on their faces from the trace of prostration. That is their description in the Torah. And their description in the Gospel is as a plant which produces its offshoots and strengthens them so they grow firm and stand upon their stalks, delighting the sowers - so that Allah may enrage by them the disbelievers. Allah has promised those who believe and do righteous deeds among them forgiveness and a great reward.

pivot_verses.ar: وَإِن طَآئِفَتَانِ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٱقْتَتَلُوا۟ فَأَصْلِحُوا۟ بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ فَإِنۢ بَغَتْ إِحْدَىٰهُمَا عَلَى ٱلْأُخْرَىٰ فَقَٰتِلُوا۟ ٱلَّتِى تَبْغِى حَتَّىٰ تَفِىٓءَ إِلَىٰٓ أَمْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ فَإِن فَآءَتْ فَأَصْلِحُوا۟ بَيْنَهُمَا بِٱلْعَدْلِ وَأَقْسِطُوٓا۟ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُقْسِطِينَ
pivot_verses.en: And if two factions among the believers should fight, then make settlement between the two. But if one of them oppresses the other, then fight against the one that oppresses until it returns to the ordinance of Allah. And if it returns, then make settlement between them in justice and act justly. Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌۭ فَأَصْلِحُوا۟ بَيْنَ أَخَوَيْكُمْ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
pivot_verses.en: The believers are but brothers, so make settlement between your brothers. And fear Allah that you may receive mercy.

control_verses.ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا يَسْخَرْ قَوْمٌۭ مِّن قَوْمٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونُوا۟ خَيْرًۭا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا نِسَآءٌۭ مِّن نِّسَآءٍ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُنَّ خَيْرًۭا مِّنْهُنَّ ۖ وَلَا تَلْمِزُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَلَا تَنَابَزُوا۟ بِٱلْأَلْقَٰبِ ۖ بِئْسَ ٱلِٱسْمُ ٱلْفُسُوقُ بَعْدَ ٱلْإِيمَٰنِ ۚ وَمَن لَّمْ يَتُبْ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ
control_verses.en: O you who have believed, let not a people ridicule [another] people; perhaps they may be better than them; nor let women ridicule [other] women; perhaps they may be better than them. And do not insult one another and do not call each other by [offensive] nicknames. Wretched is the name of disobedience after [one's] faith. And whoever does not repent - then it is those who are the wrongdoers.

control_verses.ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱجْتَنِبُوا۟ كَثِيرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِنَّ بَعْضَ ٱلظَّنِّ إِثْمٌۭ ۖ وَلَا تَجَسَّسُوا۟ وَلَا يَغْتَب بَّعْضُكُم بَعْضًا ۚ أَيُحِبُّ أَحَدُكُمْ أَن يَأْكُلَ لَحْمَ أَخِيهِ مَيْتًۭا فَكَرِهْتُمُوهُ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ تَوَّابٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
control_verses.en: O you who have believed, avoid much [negative] assumption. Indeed, some assumption is sin. And do not spy or backbite each other. Would one of you like to eat the flesh of his brother when dead? You would detest it. And fear Allah; indeed, Allah is Accepting of repentance and Merciful.

pivot_verses.ar: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍۢ مِّنْ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp."

pivot_verses.ar: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ
pivot_verses.en: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared."

control_verses.ar: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ
control_verses.en: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination

control_verses.ar: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌۭ
control_verses.en: On the Day the earth breaks away from them [and they emerge] rapidly; that is a gathering easy for Us.

pivot_block_label: Guests of Abraham — Lot's people warned

pivot_verses.ar: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
pivot_verses.en: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing."

pivot_verses.ar: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
pivot_verses.en: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"

control_verses.ar: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍۢ مُّخْتَلِفٍۢ
control_verses.en: Indeed, you are in differing speech.

control_verses.ar: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
control_verses.en: Deluded away from the Qur'an is he who is deluded.

pivot_block_label: We were fearful among our people

pivot_verses.ar: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
pivot_verses.en: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.

pivot_verses.ar: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
pivot_verses.en: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allah].

pivot_verses.ar: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
pivot_verses.en: So Allah conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."

control_verses.ar: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَٰلِقُونَ
control_verses.en: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?

control_verses.ar: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
control_verses.en: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.

control_verses.ar: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
control_verses.en: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?

control_verses.ar: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌۭ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
control_verses.en: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority.

pivot_verses.ar: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
pivot_verses.en: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.

pivot_verses.ar: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
pivot_verses.en: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.

pivot_verses.ar: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسَٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
pivot_verses.en: And to Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth - that He may recompense those who do evil with [the penalty of] what they have done and recompense those who do good with the best [reward] -

pivot_verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ ۚ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌۭ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمْ ۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
pivot_verses.en: Those who avoid the major sins and immoralities, only [committing] slight ones. Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. He was most knowing of you when He produced you from the earth and when you were fetuses in the wombs of your mothers. So do not claim yourselves to be pure; He is most knowing of who fears Him.

control_verses.ar: ذُو مِرَّةٍۢ فَٱسْتَوَىٰ
control_verses.en: One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form

control_verses.ar: وَهُوَ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
control_verses.en: While he was in the higher [part of the] horizon.

control_verses.ar: ثُمَّ دَنَا فَتَدَلَّىٰ
control_verses.en: Then he approached and descended

control_verses.ar: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوْسَيْنِ أَوْ أَدْنَىٰ
control_verses.en: And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer.

pivot_verses.ar: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
pivot_verses.en: Thamud denied the warning

pivot_verses.ar: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًۭا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًۭا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًۭا لَّفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍ
pivot_verses.en: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

pivot_verses.ar: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

pivot_verses.ar: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًۭا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
pivot_verses.en: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةًۭ لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.

pivot_verses.ar: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍۢ مُّحْتَضَرٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

pivot_verses.ar: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
pivot_verses.en: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].

pivot_verses.ar: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
pivot_verses.en: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, We sent upon them one blast from the sky, and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.

pivot_verses.ar: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
pivot_verses.en: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

control_verses.ar: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
control_verses.en: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."

control_verses.ar: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌۭ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ
control_verses.en: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.

control_verses.ar: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
control_verses.en: So taste My punishment and warning.

control_verses.ar: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
control_verses.en: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

control_verses.ar: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
control_verses.en: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.

control_verses.ar: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
control_verses.en: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.

control_verses.ar: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌۭ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
control_verses.en: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scripture?

control_verses.ar: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌۭ مُّنتَصِرٌۭ
control_verses.en: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

control_verses.ar: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
control_verses.en: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].

control_verses.ar: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
control_verses.en: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.

pivot_verses.ar: كُلُّ مَنْ عَلَيْهَا فَانٍۢ
pivot_verses.en: Everyone upon the earth will perish,

pivot_verses.ar: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
pivot_verses.en: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.

control_verses.ar: مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ
control_verses.en: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side];

control_verses.ar: بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌۭ لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ
control_verses.en: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses.

pivot_block_label: We created you — why not believe?

pivot_verses.ar: نَحْنُ خَلَقْنَٰكُمْ فَلَوْلَا تُصَدِّقُونَ
pivot_verses.en: We have created you, so why do you not believe?

pivot_verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تُمْنُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Have you seen that which you emit?

pivot_verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمْ تَخْلُقُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْخَٰلِقُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?

pivot_verses.ar: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
pivot_verses.en: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone

pivot_verses.ar: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
pivot_verses.en: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.

pivot_verses.ar: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
pivot_verses.en: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?

pivot_verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ
pivot_verses.en: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?

pivot_verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمْ تَزْرَعُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلزَّٰرِعُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?

pivot_verses.ar: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَٰهُ حُطَٰمًۭا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
pivot_verses.en: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّا لَمُغْرَمُونَ
pivot_verses.en: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt;

pivot_verses.ar: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Rather, we have been deprived."

pivot_verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلْمَآءَ ٱلَّذِى تَشْرَبُونَ
pivot_verses.en: And have you seen the water that you drink?

pivot_verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?

pivot_verses.ar: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَٰهُ أُجَاجًۭا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
pivot_verses.en: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?

pivot_verses.ar: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى تُورُونَ
pivot_verses.en: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?

pivot_verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
pivot_verses.en: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?

pivot_verses.ar: نَحْنُ جَعَلْنَٰهَا تَذْكِرَةًۭ وَمَتَٰعًۭا لِّلْمُقْوِينَ
pivot_verses.en: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,

pivot_verses.ar: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
pivot_verses.en: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.

control_verses.ar: جَزَآءًۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
control_verses.en: As reward for what they used to do.

control_verses.ar: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًۭا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
control_verses.en: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -

control_verses.ar: إِلَّا قِيلًۭا سَلَٰمًۭا سَلَٰمًۭا
control_verses.en: Only a saying: "Peace, peace."

control_verses.ar: وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ مَآ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ
control_verses.en: The companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?

control_verses.ar: فِى سِدْرٍۢ مَّخْضُودٍۢ
control_verses.en: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed

control_verses.ar: وَطَلْحٍۢ مَّنضُودٍۢ
control_verses.en: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit]

control_verses.ar: وَظِلٍّۢ مَّمْدُودٍۢ
control_verses.en: And shade extended

control_verses.ar: وَمَآءٍۢ مَّسْكُوبٍۢ
control_verses.en: And water poured out

control_verses.ar: وَفَٰكِهَةٍۢ كَثِيرَةٍۢ
control_verses.en: And fruit, abundant [and varied],

control_verses.ar: لَّا مَقْطُوعَةٍۢ وَلَا مَمْنُوعَةٍۢ
control_verses.en: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden,

control_verses.ar: وَفُرُشٍۢ مَّرْفُوعَةٍ
control_verses.en: And [upon] beds raised high.

control_verses.ar: إِنَّآ أَنشَأْنَٰهُنَّ إِنشَآءًۭ
control_verses.en: Indeed, We have produced the women of Paradise in a [new] creation

control_verses.ar: فَجَعَلْنَٰهُنَّ أَبْكَارًا
control_verses.en: And made them virgins,

control_verses.ar: عُرُبًا أَتْرَابًۭا
control_verses.en: Devoted [to their husbands] and of equal age,

control_verses.ar: لِّأَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
control_verses.en: For the companions of the right [who are]

control_verses.ar: ثُلَّةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
control_verses.en: A company of the former peoples

control_verses.ar: وَثُلَّةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ
control_verses.en: And a company of the later peoples.

control_verses.ar: وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ مَآ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ
control_verses.en: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?

pivot_block_label: Has the time not come for hearts?

pivot_verses.ar: ۞ أَلَمْ يَأْنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَن تَخْشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمْ لِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَلَ مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبْلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْأَمَدُ فَقَسَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَٰسِقُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Has the time not come for those who have believed that their hearts should become humbly submissive at the remembrance of Allah and what has come down of the truth? And let them not be like those who were given the Scripture before, and a long period passed over them, so their hearts hardened; and many of them are defiantly disobedient.

pivot_verses.ar: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا ۚ قَدْ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Know that Allah gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. We have made clear to you the signs; perhaps you will understand.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلْمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلْمُصَّدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقْرَضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًۭا يُضَٰعَفُ لَهُمْ وَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌۭ كَرِيمٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, the men who practice charity and the women who practice charity and [they who] have loaned Allah a goodly loan - it will be multiplied for them, and they will have a noble reward.

control_verses.ar: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًۭا وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا ٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَٱلْكِتَٰبَ ۖ فَمِنْهُم مُّهْتَدٍۢ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَٰسِقُونَ
control_verses.en: And We have already sent Noah and Abraham and placed in their descendants prophethood and scripture; and among them is he who is guided, but many of them are defiantly disobedient.

control_verses.ar: ثُمَّ قَفَّيْنَا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِم بِرُسُلِنَا وَقَفَّيْنَا بِعِيسَى ٱبْنِ مَرْيَمَ وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُ ٱلْإِنجِيلَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّبَعُوهُ رَأْفَةًۭ وَرَحْمَةًۭ وَرَهْبَانِيَّةً ٱبْتَدَعُوهَا مَا كَتَبْنَٰهَا عَلَيْهِمْ إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ رِضْوَٰنِ ٱللَّهِ فَمَا رَعَوْهَا حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهَا ۖ فَـَٔاتَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ أَجْرَهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَٰسِقُونَ
control_verses.en: Then We sent following their footsteps Our messengers and followed [them] with Jesus, the son of Mary, and gave him the Gospel. And We placed in the hearts of those who followed him compassion and mercy and monasticism, which they innovated; We did not prescribe it for them except [that they did so] seeking the approval of Allah. But they did not observe it with due observance. So We gave the ones who believed among them their reward, but many of them are defiantly disobedient.

control_verses.ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِرَسُولِهِۦ يُؤْتِكُمْ كِفْلَيْنِ مِن رَّحْمَتِهِۦ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ نُورًۭا تَمْشُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
control_verses.en: O you who have believed, fear Allah and believe in His Messenger; He will [then] give you a double portion of His mercy and make for you a light by which you will walk and forgive you; and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.

pivot_verses.ar: أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ نُهُوا۟ عَنِ ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا نُهُوا۟ عَنْهُ وَيَتَنَٰجَوْنَ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَإِذَا جَآءُوكَ حَيَّوْكَ بِمَا لَمْ يُحَيِّكَ بِهِ ٱللَّهُ وَيَقُولُونَ فِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَوْلَا يُعَذِّبُنَا ٱللَّهُ بِمَا نَقُولُ ۚ حَسْبُهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ يَصْلَوْنَهَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
pivot_verses.en: Have you not considered those who were forbidden from private conversation, then they return to that which they were forbidden and converse among themselves about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger? And when they come to you, they greet you with that [word] by which Allah does not greet you and say among themselves, "Why does Allah not punish us for what we say?" Sufficient for them is Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the destination.

pivot_verses.ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا تَنَٰجَيْتُمْ فَلَا تَتَنَٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَتَنَٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَٱلتَّقْوَىٰ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِىٓ إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
pivot_verses.en: O you who have believed, when you converse privately, do not converse about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger but converse about righteousness and piety. And fear Allah, to whom you will be gathered.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّمَا ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنِ لِيَحْزُنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَلَيْسَ بِضَآرِّهِمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Private conversation is only from Satan that he may grieve those who have believed, but he will not harm them at all except by permission of Allah. And upon Allah let the believers rely.

control_verses.ar: فَمَن لَّمْ يَجِدْ فَصِيَامُ شَهْرَيْنِ مُتَتَابِعَيْنِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّا ۖ فَمَن لَّمْ يَسْتَطِعْ فَإِطْعَامُ سِتِّينَ مِسْكِينًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ۚ وَتِلْكَ حُدُودُ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَلِلْكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
control_verses.en: And he who does not find [a slave] - then a fast for two months consecutively before they touch one another; and he who is unable - then the feeding of sixty poor persons. That is for you to believe [completely] in Allah and His Messenger; and those are the limits [set by] Allah. And for the disbelievers is a painful punishment.

control_verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ كُبِتُوا۟ كَمَا كُبِتَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ وَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ ءَايَٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَٰتٍۢ ۚ وَلِلْكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌۭ مُّهِينٌۭ
control_verses.en: Indeed, those who oppose Allah and His Messenger are abased as those before them were abased. And We have certainly sent down verses of clear evidence. And for the disbelievers is a humiliating punishment.

control_verses.ar: يَوْمَ يَبْعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعًۭا فَيُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوٓا۟ ۚ أَحْصَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ وَنَسُوهُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ شَهِيدٌ
control_verses.en: On the Day when Allah will resurrect them all and inform them of what they did. Allah had enumerated it, while they forgot it; and Allah is, over all things, Witness.

pivot_verses.ar: لَئِنْ أُخْرِجُوا۟ لَا يَخْرُجُونَ مَعَهُمْ وَلَئِن قُوتِلُوا۟ لَا يَنصُرُونَهُمْ وَلَئِن نَّصَرُوهُمْ لَيُوَلُّنَّ ٱلْأَدْبَٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يُنصَرُونَ
pivot_verses.en: If they are expelled, they will not leave with them, and if they are fought, they will not aid them. And [even] if they should aid them, they will surely turn their backs; then [thereafter] they will not be aided.

pivot_verses.ar: لَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ رَهْبَةًۭ فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌۭ لَّا يَفْقَهُونَ
pivot_verses.en: You [believers] are more fearful within their breasts than Allah. That is because they are a people who do not understand.

control_verses.ar: وَلَوْلَآ أَن كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْجَلَآءَ لَعَذَّبَهُمْ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ عَذَابُ ٱلنَّارِ
control_verses.en: And if not that Allah had decreed for them evacuation, He would have punished them in [this] world, and for them in the Hereafter is the punishment of the Fire.

control_verses.ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ شَآقُّوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ ۖ وَمَن يُشَآقِّ ٱللَّهَ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلْعِقَابِ
control_verses.en: That is because they opposed Allah and His Messenger. And whoever opposes Allah - then indeed, Allah is severe in penalty.

pivot_block_label: Perhaps Allah will put affection between you

pivot_verses.ar: ۞ عَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ ٱلَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةًۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ قَدِيرٌۭ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: Perhaps Allah will put, between you and those to whom you have been enemies among them, affection. And Allah is competent, and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.

control_verses.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَّخِذُوا۟ عَدُوِّى وَعَدُوَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءَ تُلْقُونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا۟ بِمَا جَآءَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْحَقِّ يُخْرِجُونَ ٱلرَّسُولَ وَإِيَّاكُمْ ۙ أَن تُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ رَبِّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ خَرَجْتُمْ جِهَٰدًۭا فِى سَبِيلِى وَٱبْتِغَآءَ مَرْضَاتِى ۚ تُسِرُّونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَأَنَا۠ أَعْلَمُ بِمَآ أَخْفَيْتُمْ وَمَآ أَعْلَنتُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْهُ مِنكُمْ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ
control_verses.en: O you who have believed, do not take My enemies and your enemies as allies, extending to them affection while they have disbelieved in what came to you of the truth, having driven out the Prophet and yourselves [only] because you believe in Allah, your Lord. If you have come out for jihad in My cause and seeking means to My approval, [take them not as friends]. You confide to them affection, but I am most knowing of what you have concealed and what you have declared. And whoever does it among you has certainly strayed from the soundness of the way.

pivot_block_label: Moses — why do you harm me?

pivot_verses.ar: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ يَٰقَوْمِ لِمَ تُؤْذُونَنِى وَقَد تَّعْلَمُونَ أَنِّى رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ إِلَيْكُمْ ۖ فَلَمَّا زَاغُوٓا۟ أَزَاغَ ٱللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْفَٰسِقِينَ
pivot_verses.en: And [mention, O Muhammad], when Moses said to his people, "O my people, why do you harm me while you certainly know that I am the messenger of Allah to you?" And when they deviated, Allah caused their hearts to deviate. And Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.

pivot_verses.ar: وَإِذْ قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ يَٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ إِلَيْكُم مُّصَدِّقًۭا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَىَّ مِنَ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةِ وَمُبَشِّرًۢا بِرَسُولٍۢ يَأْتِى مِنۢ بَعْدِى ٱسْمُهُۥٓ أَحْمَدُ ۖ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ قَالُوا۟ هَٰذَا سِحْرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: And [mention] when Jesus, the son of Mary, said, "O children of Israel, indeed I am the messenger of Allah to you confirming what came before me of the Torah and bringing good tidings of a messenger to come after me, whose name is Ahmad." But when he came to them with clear evidences, they said, "This is obvious magic."

pivot_verses.ar: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلْإِسْلَٰمِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
pivot_verses.en: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah untruth while he is being invited to Islam. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.

control_verses.ar: تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُجَٰهِدُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِأَمْوَٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
control_verses.en: [It is that] you believe in Allah and His Messenger and strive in the cause of Allah with your wealth and your lives. That is best for you, if you should know.

control_verses.ar: يَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ وَيُدْخِلْكُمْ جَنَّٰتٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ وَمَسَٰكِنَ طَيِّبَةًۭ فِى جَنَّٰتِ عَدْنٍۢ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
control_verses.en: He will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence. That is the great attainment.

control_verses.ar: وَأُخْرَىٰ تُحِبُّونَهَا ۖ نَصْرٌۭ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَفَتْحٌۭ قَرِيبٌۭ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
control_verses.en: And [you will obtain] another [favor] that you love - victory from Allah and an imminent conquest; and give good tidings to the believers.

pivot_block_label: Wish for death if you are truthful

pivot_verses.ar: قُلْ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ هَادُوٓا۟ إِن زَعَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءُ لِلَّهِ مِن دُونِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا۟ ٱلْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
pivot_verses.en: Say, "O you who are Jews, if you claim that you are allies of Allah, excluding the [other] people, then wish for death, if you should be truthful."

control_verses.ar: ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
control_verses.en: That is the bounty of Allah, which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty.

pivot_verses.ar: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَعَالَوْا۟ يَسْتَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ لَوَّوْا۟ رُءُوسَهُمْ وَرَأَيْتَهُمْ يَصُدُّونَ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
pivot_verses.en: And when it is said to them, "Come, the Messenger of Allah will ask forgiveness for you," they turn their heads aside and you see them evading while they are arrogant.

pivot_verses.ar: سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ أَسْتَغْفَرْتَ لَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ لَن يَغْفِرَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْفَٰسِقِينَ
pivot_verses.en: It is all the same for them whether you ask forgiveness for them or do not ask forgiveness for them; never will Allah forgive them. Indeed, Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.

control_verses.ar: وَأَنفِقُوا۟ مِن مَّا رَزَقْنَٰكُم مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ أَحَدَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتُ فَيَقُولَ رَبِّ لَوْلَآ أَخَّرْتَنِىٓ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ قَرِيبٍۢ فَأَصَّدَّقَ وَأَكُن مِّنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
control_verses.en: And spend [in the way of Allah] from what We have provided you before death approaches one of you and he says, "My Lord, if only You would delay me for a brief term so I would give charity and be among the righteous."

control_verses.ar: وَلَن يُؤَخِّرَ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهَا ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
control_verses.en: But never will Allah delay a soul when its time has come. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do.

pivot_block_label: The Day of Gathering — the Day of Loss

pivot_verses.ar: يَوْمَ يَجْمَعُكُمْ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْجَمْعِ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلتَّغَابُنِ ۗ وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَٰلِحًۭا يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَيُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّٰتٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
pivot_verses.en: The Day He will assemble you for the Day of Assembly - that is the Day of Deprivation. And whoever believes in Allah and does righteousness - He will remove from him his misdeeds and admit him to gardens beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever. That is the great attainment.

pivot_verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
pivot_verses.en: But the ones who disbelieved and denied Our verses - those are the companions of the Fire, abiding eternally therein; and wretched is the destination.

control_verses.ar: أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ فَذَاقُوا۟ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهِمْ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
control_verses.en: Has there not come to you the news of those who disbelieved before? So they tasted the bad consequence of their affair, and they will have a painful punishment.

control_verses.ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُۥ كَانَت تَّأْتِيهِمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرٌۭ يَهْدُونَنَا فَكَفَرُوا۟ وَتَوَلَّوا۟ ۚ وَّٱسْتَغْنَى ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَنِىٌّ حَمِيدٌۭ
control_verses.en: That is because their messengers used to come to them with clear evidences, but they said, "Shall human beings guide us?" and disbelieved and turned away. And Allah dispensed [with them]; and Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy.

pivot_block_label: House them and do not harm them

pivot_verses.ar: أَسْكِنُوهُنَّ مِنْ حَيْثُ سَكَنتُم مِّن وُجْدِكُمْ وَلَا تُضَآرُّوهُنَّ لِتُضَيِّقُوا۟ عَلَيْهِنَّ ۚ وَإِن كُنَّ أُو۟لَٰتِ حَمْلٍۢ فَأَنفِقُوا۟ عَلَيْهِنَّ حَتَّىٰ يَضَعْنَ حَمْلَهُنَّ ۚ فَإِنْ أَرْضَعْنَ لَكُمْ فَـَٔاتُوهُنَّ أُجُورَهُنَّ ۖ وَأْتَمِرُوا۟ بَيْنَكُم بِمَعْرُوفٍۢ ۖ وَإِن تَعَاسَرْتُمْ فَسَتُرْضِعُ لَهُۥٓ أُخْرَىٰ
pivot_verses.en: Lodge them [in a section] of where you dwell out of your means and do not harm them in order to oppress them. And if they should be pregnant, then spend on them until they give birth. And if they breastfeed for you, then give them their payment and confer among yourselves in the acceptable way; but if you are in discord, then there may breastfeed for the father another woman.

pivot_verses.ar: لِيُنفِقْ ذُو سَعَةٍۢ مِّن سَعَتِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن قُدِرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقُهُۥ فَلْيُنفِقْ مِمَّآ ءَاتَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ ۚ لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا مَآ ءَاتَىٰهَا ۚ سَيَجْعَلُ ٱللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍۢ يُسْرًۭا
pivot_verses.en: Let a man of wealth spend from his wealth, and he whose provision is restricted - let him spend from what Allah has given him. Allah does not charge a soul except [according to] what He has given it. Allah will bring about, after hardship, ease.

control_verses.ar: فَإِذَا بَلَغْنَ أَجَلَهُنَّ فَأَمْسِكُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍ أَوْ فَارِقُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍۢ وَأَشْهِدُوا۟ ذَوَىْ عَدْلٍۢ مِّنكُمْ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلشَّهَٰدَةَ لِلَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ يُوعَظُ بِهِۦ مَن كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مَخْرَجًۭا
control_verses.en: And when they have [nearly] fulfilled their term, either retain them according to acceptable terms or part with them according to acceptable terms. And bring to witness two just men from among you and establish the testimony for [the acceptance of] Allah. That is instructed to whoever should believe in Allah and the Last day. And whoever fears Allah - He will make for him a way out

control_verses.ar: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بَٰلِغُ أَمْرِهِۦ ۚ قَدْ جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدْرًۭا
control_verses.en: And will provide for him from where he does not expect. And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him. Indeed, Allah will accomplish His purpose. Allah has already set for everything a [decreed] extent.

pivot_verses.ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَهْلِيكُمْ نَارًۭا وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ عَلَيْهَا مَلَٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظٌۭ شِدَادٌۭ لَّا يَعْصُونَ ٱللَّهَ مَآ أَمَرَهُمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
pivot_verses.en: O you who have believed, protect yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is people and stones, over which are [appointed] angels, harsh and severe; they do not disobey Allah in what He commands them but do what they are commanded.

pivot_verses.ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَا تَعْتَذِرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
pivot_verses.en: O you who have disbelieved, make no excuses that Day. You will only be recompensed for what you used to do.

pivot_verses.ar: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ تَوْبَةًۭ نَّصُوحًا عَسَىٰ رَبُّكُمْ أَن يُكَفِّرَ عَنكُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتِكُمْ وَيُدْخِلَكُمْ جَنَّٰتٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ يَوْمَ لَا يُخْزِى ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّبِىَّ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ ۖ نُورُهُمْ يَسْعَىٰ بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَٰنِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ أَتْمِمْ لَنَا نُورَنَا وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَآ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: O you who have believed, repent to Allah with sincere repentance. Perhaps your Lord will remove from you your misdeeds and admit you into gardens beneath which rivers flow [on] the Day when Allah will not disgrace the Prophet and those who believed with him. Their light will proceed before them and on their right; they will say, "Our Lord, perfect for us our light and forgive us. Indeed, You are over all things competent."

control_verses.ar: قَدْ فَرَضَ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ تَحِلَّةَ أَيْمَٰنِكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
control_verses.en: Allah has already ordained for you [Muslims] the dissolution of your oaths. And Allah is your protector, and He is the Knowing, the Wise.

control_verses.ar: وَإِذْ أَسَرَّ ٱلنَّبِىُّ إِلَىٰ بَعْضِ أَزْوَٰجِهِۦ حَدِيثًۭا فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَتْ بِهِۦ وَأَظْهَرَهُ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ عَرَّفَ بَعْضَهُۥ وَأَعْرَضَ عَنۢ بَعْضٍۢ ۖ فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَهَا بِهِۦ قَالَتْ مَنْ أَنۢبَأَكَ هَٰذَا ۖ قَالَ نَبَّأَنِىَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
control_verses.en: And [remember] when the Prophet confided to one of his wives a statement; and when she informed [another] of it and Allah showed it to him, he made known part of it and ignored a part. And when he informed her about it, she said, "Who told you this?" He said, "I was informed by the Knowing, the Acquainted."

control_verses.ar: إِن تَتُوبَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ فَقَدْ صَغَتْ قُلُوبُكُمَا ۖ وَإِن تَظَٰهَرَا عَلَيْهِ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ مَوْلَىٰهُ وَجِبْرِيلُ وَصَٰلِحُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ۖ وَٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ ظَهِيرٌ
control_verses.en: If you two [wives] repent to Allah, [it is best], for your hearts have deviated. But if you cooperate against him - then indeed Allah is his protector, and Gabriel and the righteous of the believers and the angels, moreover, are [his] assistants.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌۭ وَأَجْرٌۭ كَبِيرٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, those who fear their Lord unseen will have forgiveness and great reward.

pivot_verses.ar: وَأَسِرُّوا۟ قَوْلَكُمْ أَوِ ٱجْهَرُوا۟ بِهِۦٓ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
pivot_verses.en: And conceal your speech or publicize it; indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.

pivot_verses.ar: أَلَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
pivot_verses.en: Does He who created not know, while He is the Subtle, the Acquainted?

pivot_verses.ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًۭا فَٱمْشُوا۟ فِى مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِهِۦ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
pivot_verses.en: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection.

control_verses.ar: ثُمَّ ٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ يَنقَلِبْ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْبَصَرُ خَاسِئًۭا وَهُوَ حَسِيرٌۭ
control_verses.en: Then return [your] vision twice again. [Your] vision will return to you humbled while it is fatigued.

control_verses.ar: وَلَقَدْ زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِمَصَٰبِيحَ وَجَعَلْنَٰهَا رُجُومًۭا لِّلشَّيَٰطِينِ ۖ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لَهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
control_verses.en: And We have certainly beautified the nearest heaven with stars and have made [from] them what is thrown at the devils and have prepared for them the punishment of the Blaze.

control_verses.ar: وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِرَبِّهِمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
control_verses.en: And for those who disbelieved in their Lord is the punishment of Hell, and wretched is the destination.

control_verses.ar: إِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ فِيهَا سَمِعُوا۟ لَهَا شَهِيقًۭا وَهِىَ تَفُورُ
control_verses.en: When they are thrown into it, they hear from it a [dreadful] inhaling while it boils up.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا۟ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, We have tried them as We tried the companions of the garden, when they swore to cut its fruit in the [early] morning

pivot_verses.ar: وَلَا يَسْتَثْنُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Without making exception.

pivot_verses.ar: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
pivot_verses.en: So there came upon the garden an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep.

pivot_verses.ar: فَأَصْبَحَتْ كَٱلصَّرِيمِ
pivot_verses.en: And it became as though reaped.

pivot_verses.ar: فَتَنَادَوْا۟ مُصْبِحِينَ
pivot_verses.en: And they called one another at morning,

pivot_verses.ar: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰرِمِينَ
pivot_verses.en: [Saying], "Go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit."

pivot_verses.ar: فَٱنطَلَقُوا۟ وَهُمْ يَتَخَٰفَتُونَ
pivot_verses.en: So they set out, while lowering their voices,

pivot_verses.ar: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: [Saying], "There will surely not enter it today upon you [any] poor person."

pivot_verses.ar: وَغَدَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْدٍۢ قَٰدِرِينَ
pivot_verses.en: And they went early in determination, [assuming themselves] able.

pivot_verses.ar: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهَا قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا لَضَآلُّونَ
pivot_verses.en: But when they saw it, they said, "Indeed, we are lost;

pivot_verses.ar: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Rather, we have been deprived."

pivot_verses.ar: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
pivot_verses.en: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, 'Why do you not exalt [Allah]?' "

pivot_verses.ar: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
pivot_verses.en: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."

pivot_verses.ar: فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ يَتَلَٰوَمُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Then they approached one another, blaming each other.

pivot_verses.ar: قَالُوا۟ يَٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا طَٰغِينَ
pivot_verses.en: They said, "O woe to us; indeed we were transgressors.

pivot_verses.ar: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًۭا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Perhaps our Lord will substitute for us [one] better than it. Indeed, we are toward our Lord desirous."

control_verses.ar: أَفَنَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ كَٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
control_verses.en: Then will We treat the Muslims like the criminals?

control_verses.ar: مَا لَكُمْ كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ
control_verses.en: What is [the matter] with you? How do you judge?

control_verses.ar: أَمْ لَكُمْ كِتَٰبٌۭ فِيهِ تَدْرُسُونَ
control_verses.en: Or do you have a scripture in which you learn

control_verses.ar: إِنَّ لَكُمْ فِيهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُونَ
control_verses.en: That indeed for you is whatever you choose?

control_verses.ar: أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَٰنٌ عَلَيْنَا بَٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۙ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ
control_verses.en: Or do you have oaths [binding] upon Us, extending until the Day of Resurrection, that indeed for you is whatever you judge?

control_verses.ar: سَلْهُمْ أَيُّهُم بِذَٰلِكَ زَعِيمٌ
control_verses.en: Ask them which of them, for that [claim], is responsible.

control_verses.ar: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَٰدِقِينَ
control_verses.en: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful.

control_verses.ar: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍۢ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
control_verses.en: The Day the shin will be uncovered and they are invited to prostration but the disbelievers will not be able,

control_verses.ar: خَٰشِعَةً أَبْصَٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌۭ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا۟ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَٰلِمُونَ
control_verses.en: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. And they used to be invited to prostration while they were sound.

control_verses.ar: فَذَرْنِى وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ ۖ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
control_verses.en: So leave Me, [O Muhammad], with [the matter of] whoever denies the Qur'an. We will progressively lead them [to punishment] from where they do not know.

control_verses.ar: وَأُمْلِى لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ كَيْدِى مَتِينٌ
control_verses.en: And I will give them time. Indeed, My plan is firm.

control_verses.ar: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًۭا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍۢ مُّثْقَلُونَ
control_verses.en: Or do you ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?

control_verses.ar: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
control_verses.en: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?

control_verses.ar: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌۭ
control_verses.en: Then be patient for the decision of your Lord, [O Muhammad], and be not like the companion of the fish when he called out while he was distressed.

control_verses.ar: لَّوْلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعْمَةٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌۭ
control_verses.en: If not that a favor from his Lord overtook him, he would have been thrown onto the naked shore while he was censured.

control_verses.ar: فَٱجْتَبَٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
control_verses.en: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.

pivot_block_label: Record in right hand or behind back

pivot_verses.ar: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَٰبِيَهْ
pivot_verses.en: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!

pivot_verses.ar: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلَٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."

pivot_verses.ar: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍۢ رَّاضِيَةٍۢ
pivot_verses.en: So he will be in a pleasant life -

pivot_verses.ar: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍۢ
pivot_verses.en: In an elevated garden,

pivot_verses.ar: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.

pivot_verses.ar: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
pivot_verses.en: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."

pivot_verses.ar: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَٰبِيَهْ
pivot_verses.en: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record

pivot_verses.ar: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
pivot_verses.en: And had not known what is my account.

pivot_verses.ar: يَٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ
pivot_verses.en: I wish my death had been the decisive one.

pivot_verses.ar: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنِّى مَالِيَهْ ۜ
pivot_verses.en: My wealth has not availed me.

pivot_verses.ar: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطَٰنِيَهْ
pivot_verses.en: Gone from me is my authority."

control_verses.ar: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
control_verses.en: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him.

control_verses.ar: ثُمَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ
control_verses.en: Then into Hellfire drive him.

control_verses.ar: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍۢ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًۭا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
control_verses.en: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."

control_verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
control_verses.en: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great,

control_verses.ar: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
control_verses.en: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.

control_verses.ar: فَلَيْسَ لَهُ ٱلْيَوْمَ هَٰهُنَا حَمِيمٌۭ
control_verses.en: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend

control_verses.ar: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنْ غِسْلِينٍۢ
control_verses.en: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds;

control_verses.ar: لَّا يَأْكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْخَٰطِـُٔونَ
control_verses.en: None will eat it except the sinners.

control_verses.ar: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَا تُبْصِرُونَ
control_verses.en: So I swear by what you see

control_verses.ar: وَمَا لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
control_verses.en: And what you do not see

control_verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍۢ كَرِيمٍۢ
control_verses.en: [That] indeed, the Qur'an is the word of a noble Messenger.

pivot_verses.ar: إِلَّا ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ
pivot_verses.en: Except the observers of prayer -

control_verses.ar: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍۢ
control_verses.en: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure?

pivot_block_label: Why do you not honor Allah?

pivot_verses.ar: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَٰوَٰتٍۢ طِبَاقًۭا
pivot_verses.en: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers

pivot_verses.ar: وَجَعَلَ ٱلْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًۭا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًۭا
pivot_verses.en: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?

control_verses.ar: وَقَالَ نُوحٌۭ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
control_verses.en: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.

control_verses.ar: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًۭا كَفَّارًۭا
control_verses.en: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

pivot_verses.ar: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ فَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًۭا وَلَا رَهَقًۭا
pivot_verses.en: And when we heard the guidance, we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden.

control_verses.ar: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسَٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًۭا
control_verses.en: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allah, so do not invoke with Allah anyone.

pivot_block_label: Be patient — leave Me with the deniers

pivot_verses.ar: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًۭا جَمِيلًۭا
pivot_verses.en: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.

pivot_verses.ar: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
pivot_verses.en: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little.

control_verses.ar: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًۭٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
control_verses.en: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.

control_verses.ar: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًۭا طَوِيلًۭا
control_verses.en: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.

pivot_block_label: I will drive him into Saqar

pivot_verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سَقَرُ
pivot_verses.en: And what can make you know what is Saqar?

control_verses.ar: نَذِيرًۭا لِّلْبَشَرِ
control_verses.en: As a warning to humanity -

pivot_verses.ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا بَيَانَهُۥ
pivot_verses.en: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you].

pivot_verses.ar: كَلَّا بَلْ تُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ
pivot_verses.en: No! But you love the immediate

control_verses.ar: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمَسَاقُ
control_verses.en: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession.

control_verses.ar: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ
control_verses.en: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءًۭ وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
pivot_verses.en: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًۭا
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur'an progressively.

control_verses.ar: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًۭا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًۭا
control_verses.en: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

control_verses.ar: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًۭا وَيَتِيمًۭا وَأَسِيرًا
control_verses.en: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,

pivot_block_label: Woe that Day to the deniers

pivot_verses.ar: أَحْيَآءًۭ وَأَمْوَٰتًۭا
pivot_verses.en: Of the living and the dead?

control_verses.ar: كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
control_verses.en: Thus do We deal with the criminals.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًۭا
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait

control_verses.ar: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ
control_verses.en: Then, no! They are going to know.

pivot_block_label: Moses warns — a lesson for those who fear

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةًۭ لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah].

pivot_verses.ar: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا
pivot_verses.en: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it.

control_verses.ar: أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَٰمًۭا نَّخِرَةًۭ
control_verses.en: Even if we should be decayed bones?

control_verses.ar: قَالُوا۟ تِلْكَ إِذًۭا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٌۭ
control_verses.en: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return."

pivot_block_label: Man has not done what He commanded

pivot_verses.ar: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقْضِ مَآ أَمَرَهُۥ
pivot_verses.en: No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him.

control_verses.ar: كِرَامٍۭ بَرَرَةٍۢ
control_verses.en: Noble and dutiful.

pivot_block_label: A soul will know what it brought

pivot_verses.ar: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌۭ مَّآ أَحْضَرَتْ
pivot_verses.en: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].

pivot_verses.ar: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلْخُنَّسِ
pivot_verses.en: So I swear by the retreating stars -

control_verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ سُجِّرَتْ
control_verses.en: And when the seas are filled with flame

control_verses.ar: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّفُوسُ زُوِّجَتْ
control_verses.en: And when the souls are paired

pivot_verses.ar: كَلَّا بَلْ تُكَذِّبُونَ بِٱلدِّينِ
pivot_verses.en: No! But you deny the Recompense.

control_verses.ar: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
control_verses.en: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

pivot_block_label: This is what you used to deny

pivot_verses.ar: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
pivot_verses.en: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."

pivot_verses.ar: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
pivot_verses.en: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in 'illiyyun.

control_verses.ar: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
control_verses.en: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."

control_verses.ar: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
control_verses.en: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.

pivot_block_label: He thought he would never return to Allah

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فِىٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّهُۥ ظَنَّ أَن لَّن يَحُورَ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah].

pivot_verses.ar: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًۭا
pivot_verses.en: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing.

control_verses.ar: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًۭا
control_verses.en: And return to his people in happiness.

control_verses.ar: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ
control_verses.en: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,

control_verses.ar: فَسَوْفَ يَدْعُوا۟ ثُبُورًۭا
control_verses.en: He will cry out for destruction

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّٰتٌۭ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.

control_verses.ar: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
control_verses.en: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,

control_verses.ar: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ شَهِيدٌ
control_verses.en: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allah, over all things, is Witness.

pivot_verses.ar: يَوْمَ تُبْلَى ٱلسَّرَآئِرُ
pivot_verses.en: The Day when secrets will be put on trial,

pivot_verses.ar: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍۢ وَلَا نَاصِرٍۢ
pivot_verses.en: Then man will have no power or any helper.

control_verses.ar: إِنَّهُمْ يَكِيدُونَ كَيْدًۭا
control_verses.en: Indeed, they are planning a plan,

control_verses.ar: وَأَكِيدُ كَيْدًۭا
control_verses.en: But I am planning a plan.

pivot_verses.ar: فَذَكِّرْ إِن نَّفَعَتِ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
pivot_verses.en: So remind, if the reminder should benefit;

pivot_verses.ar: سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰ
pivot_verses.en: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.

control_verses.ar: سَنُقْرِئُكَ فَلَا تَنسَىٰٓ
control_verses.en: We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget,

control_verses.ar: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ
control_verses.en: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.

pivot_block_label: Do they not look at the camel and sky?

pivot_verses.ar: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ
pivot_verses.en: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created?

control_verses.ar: وُجُوهٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَٰشِعَةٌ
control_verses.en: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled,

pivot_block_label: You do not honor the orphan

pivot_verses.ar: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا تُكْرِمُونَ ٱلْيَتِيمَ
pivot_verses.en: No! But you do not honor the orphan

control_verses.ar: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَٰدِ
control_verses.en: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?

pivot_block_label: He has not attempted the difficult pass

pivot_verses.ar: فَلَا ٱقْتَحَمَ ٱلْعَقَبَةَ
pivot_verses.en: But he has not broken through the difficult pass.

pivot_verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْعَقَبَةُ
pivot_verses.en: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?

control_verses.ar: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ
control_verses.en: Those are the companions of the right.

control_verses.ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا هُمْ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
control_verses.en: But they who disbelieved in Our signs - those are the companions of the left.

pivot_block_label: He who purifies the soul succeeds

pivot_verses.ar: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن زَكَّىٰهَا
pivot_verses.en: He has succeeded who purifies it,

pivot_verses.ar: وَقَدْ خَابَ مَن دَسَّىٰهَا
pivot_verses.en: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption].

control_verses.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلشَّمْسِ وَضُحَىٰهَا
control_verses.en: By the sun and its brightness

control_verses.ar: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا تَلَىٰهَا
control_verses.en: And [by] the moon when it follows it

pivot_block_label: What will his wealth avail when he falls?

pivot_verses.ar: وَمَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
pivot_verses.en: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?

control_verses.ar: ٱلَّذِى كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
control_verses.en: Who had denied and turned away.

pivot_block_label: He found you poor and enriched you

pivot_verses.ar: وَوَجَدَكَ عَآئِلًۭا فَأَغْنَىٰ
pivot_verses.en: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.

pivot_verses.ar: فَأَمَّا ٱلْيَتِيمَ فَلَا تَقْهَرْ
pivot_verses.en: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].

control_verses.ar: وَلَلْءَاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
control_verses.en: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].

control_verses.ar: وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَىٰٓ
control_verses.en: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.

pivot_verses.ar: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
pivot_verses.en: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًۭا
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.

control_verses.ar: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنقَضَ ظَهْرَكَ
control_verses.en: Which had weighed upon your back

control_verses.ar: وَرَفَعْنَا لَكَ ذِكْرَكَ
control_verses.en: And raised high for you your repute.

pivot_block_label: Then returned to the lowest of the low

pivot_verses.ar: ثُمَّ رَدَدْنَٰهُ أَسْفَلَ سَٰفِلِينَ
pivot_verses.en: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,

control_verses.ar: بِّسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلتِّينِ وَٱلزَّيْتُونِ
control_verses.en: By the fig and the olive

pivot_block_label: He who forbids a servant from prayer

pivot_verses.ar: أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يَنْهَىٰ
pivot_verses.en: Have you seen the one who forbids

pivot_verses.ar: عَبْدًا إِذَا صَلَّىٰٓ
pivot_verses.en: A servant when he prays?

control_verses.ar: ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَ بِٱلْقَلَمِ
control_verses.en: Who taught by the pen -

control_verses.ar: عَلَّمَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مَا لَمْ يَعْلَمْ
control_verses.en: Taught man that which he knew not.

pivot_verses.ar: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍۢ
pivot_verses.en: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

control_verses.ar: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍۢ
control_verses.en: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.

pivot_verses.ar: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
pivot_verses.en: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion.

control_verses.ar: رَسُولٌۭ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًۭا مُّطَهَّرَةًۭ
control_verses.en: A Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures

pivot_verses.ar: يَوْمَئِذٍۢ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا
pivot_verses.en: That Day, it will report its news

pivot_verses.ar: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا
pivot_verses.en: Because your Lord has commanded it.

control_verses.ar: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًۭا يَرَهُۥ
control_verses.en: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,

control_verses.ar: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍۢ شَرًّۭا يَرَهُۥ
control_verses.en: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.

pivot_block_label: Man is ungrateful to his Lord

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لِرَبِّهِۦ لَكَنُودٌۭ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.

control_verses.ar: وَحُصِّلَ مَا فِى ٱلصُّدُورِ
control_verses.en: And that within the breasts is obtained,

pivot_verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
pivot_verses.en: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?

pivot_verses.ar: يَوْمَ يَكُونُ ٱلنَّاسُ كَٱلْفَرَاشِ ٱلْمَبْثُوثِ
pivot_verses.en: It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed,

control_verses.ar: فَأُمُّهُۥ هَاوِيَةٌۭ
control_verses.en: His refuge will be an abyss.

control_verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا هِيَهْ
control_verses.en: And what can make you know what that is?

pivot_block_label: If only you knew with certainty

pivot_verses.ar: كَلَّا لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ ٱلْيَقِينِ
pivot_verses.en: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty...

control_verses.ar: حَتَّىٰ زُرْتُمُ ٱلْمَقَابِرَ
control_verses.en: Until you visit the graveyards.

pivot_verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لَفِى خُسْرٍ
pivot_verses.en: Indeed, mankind is in loss,

control_verses.ar: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
control_verses.en: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.

pivot_verses.ar: كَلَّا ۖ لَيُنۢبَذَنَّ فِى ٱلْحُطَمَةِ
pivot_verses.en: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.

pivot_verses.ar: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحُطَمَةُ
pivot_verses.en: And what can make you know what is the Crusher?

control_verses.ar: ٱلَّذِى جَمَعَ مَالًۭا وَعَدَّدَهُۥ
control_verses.en: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.

control_verses.ar: يَحْسَبُ أَنَّ مَالَهُۥٓ أَخْلَدَهُۥ
control_verses.en: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.

pivot_verses.ar: وَأَرْسَلَ عَلَيْهِمْ طَيْرًا أَبَابِيلَ
pivot_verses.en: And He sent against them birds in flocks,

control_verses.ar: أَلَمْ يَجْعَلْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِى تَضْلِيلٍۢ
control_verses.en: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?

pivot_block_label: Worship the Lord of this House

pivot_verses.ar: فَلْيَعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّ هَٰذَا ٱلْبَيْتِ
pivot_verses.en: Let them worship the Lord of this House,

control_verses.ar: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍۢ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
control_verses.en: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.

pivot_verses.ar: فَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلْمُصَلِّينَ
pivot_verses.en: So woe to those who pray

control_verses.ar: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ يُرَآءُونَ
control_verses.en: Those who make show [of their deeds]

pivot_block_label: Pray and sacrifice to Him alone

pivot_verses.ar: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنْحَرْ
pivot_verses.en: So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone].

control_verses.ar: إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ ٱلْأَبْتَرُ
control_verses.en: Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off.

pivot_block_label: Your way and mine are separate

pivot_verses.ar: لَكُمْ دِينُكُمْ وَلِىَ دِينِ
pivot_verses.en: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."

control_verses.ar: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ
control_verses.en: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.

pivot_verses.ar: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
pivot_verses.en: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.

control_verses.ar: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ
control_verses.en: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,

pivot_block_label: He will burn in a flaming fire

pivot_verses.ar: سَيَصْلَىٰ نَارًۭا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍۢ
pivot_verses.en: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame

control_verses.ar: فِى جِيدِهَا حَبْلٌۭ مِّن مَّسَدٍۭ
control_verses.en: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.

pivot_block_label: He neither begets nor was begotten

pivot_verses.ar: لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
pivot_verses.en: He neither begets nor is born,

control_verses.ar: ٱللَّهُ ٱلصَّمَدُ
control_verses.en: Allah, the Eternal Refuge.

pivot_block_label: Refuge from the evil of darkness

pivot_verses.ar: وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ
pivot_verses.en: And from the evil of darkness when it settles

control_verses.ar: مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
control_verses.en: From the evil of that which He created

pivot_verses.ar: مِن شَرِّ ٱلْوَسْوَاسِ ٱلْخَنَّاسِ
pivot_verses.en: From the evil of the retreating whisperer -

control_verses.ar: مَلِكِ ٱلنَّاسِ
control_verses.en: The Sovereign of mankind.
